evals.prompt: Use the Colyseus multiplayer engineering skill to review this repo's room/schema/client flow and suggest one concrete improvement.
evals.expected_output: A concise review that inspects the server room, protocol schema, and client SDK callback flow, then gives one actionable Colyseus-specific improvement with verification.

evals.prompt: Add a password-protected private room flow to the current Colyseus game without changing public runtime APIs outside the necessary protocol/server/client surfaces.
evals.expected_output: A plan or implementation that uses filterBy/private room patterns, keeps secrets out of synced schema, handles failed joins on the client, and uses Bun verification commands.

evals.prompt: Add reconnection handling so temporary disconnects preserve player state, while permanent leaves clean it up.
evals.expected_output: A plan or implementation using onDrop, allowReconnection, onReconnect, and onLeave with explicit client-side drop/reconnect/leave handling and cleanup checks.

evals.prompt: Design a load test for 50 simulated clients joining the game room and sending movement input.
evals.expected_output: A Bun-native load-test plan using @colyseus/loadtest and @colyseus/sdk, including server startup, representative bot behavior, error logging, and pass/fail signals.

evals.prompt: A new feature made GameRoom large and full of game rules. Refactor the design while preserving Colyseus behavior.
evals.expected_output: A refactor plan that keeps the room thin, moves deterministic rules into pure helpers or commands, keeps schemas data-only, and identifies targeted unit and room tests.

evals.prompt: docs/game-design now defines dash as client input with a server-authoritative result and score as shared schema state. Use the Colyseus multiplayer engineering skill to implement or plan the protocol/server side.
evals.expected_output: A plan or implementation that reads the relevant docs/game-design anchors first, preserves the stated ownership decisions, keeps dash as validated transient input with server-owned outcome, keeps score in shared schema state, and uses Bun verification commands.
